indicators.label: Swipe Away Paradox
indicators.notes: Higher swipe rate = more views (26% high-view vs 12% low-view). But r_partial=0.001 — pure consequence of reaching broader audiences.

indicators.label: Retention Variation
indicators.notes: r=-0.267 vs log(views) p=0.0001. retention_variation from YouTube analytics. partial_r=-0.210. Smoother retention curves → more views.

indicators.label: Decay Rate
indicators.notes: r=-0.062 vs log(views), r=0.285 vs retention. Post-peak view decay rate (log slope). Slower decay = better retention.

indicators.label: Duration Sweet Spot
indicators.notes: 46-60s = sweet spot (28/98 hit 10M+, 2.9M median). 15-30s = death zone (0/11, 513K median). 121s+ small sample but high avg.

indicators.label: Vz B Z C Combo
indicators.notes: Best content combo: vz_type=B + z_type=C. Median 8.2M (3x avg). Visual curiosity gap + challenge/outcome text framing.

indicators.label: Curve Shape Taxonomy
indicators.notes: medium_decay=2.8M median vs fast_decay=413K. 7x difference. Curve shape alone separates winners.

indicators.label: Title Making Keyword
indicators.notes: 'Making' = $24M avg (23 videos). Build/creation content is strongest format. 'Shoes' $11.5M, 'testing' $14M.

indicators.label: Optimal 3Signal Model
indicators.notes: r=0.61, r²=0.37. z(keep)+z(deriv_std)+z(d7d1) explains 37% of view variance. Best 3-signal model found.

indicators.label: Keep Threshold 75
indicators.notes: Non-linear: <75% keep = 3-12% hit 10M+. 75-80% = 25%. 80-85% = 41%. Marginal keep above 75 doubles hit rate.

indicators.label: Outlier Profile
indicators.notes: TOP vs BOTTOM: viewAccel 43x, kurtosis 2.5x, maxCliff 1.7x, subViewShare 0.09x, duration 1.6x. Acceleration is king differentiator.

indicators.label: Spike Decay Death
indicators.notes: 0/27 spike_decay videos hit 10M+. Day1 share >15% = DEATH. Median 0.3M. Anti-viral trajectory.

indicators.label: Multivar Partial Corrs
indicators.notes: Controlling for keep+maxCliff: viewAccel +0.32, narrativeMomentum +0.31, decayR2 -0.30, entropy +0.20. These 4 truly independent.

indicators.label: Optimal 3Signal New
indicators.notes: r=0.632. BEST 3 NEW SIGNALS: z(kurtosis)+z(viewAccel)-z(day1share). Explains 40% of view variance from new discoveries alone.

indicators.label: Keep Plus Day1Share
indicators.notes: r=0.622. keep + day1share = 39% view variance from just 2 signals. Day1share captures trajectory independently of quality.

indicators.label: Sub View Tiers
indicators.notes: subView<5%: 81% hit 10M+ (19.3M avg). subView<10%: 45% hit rate. Algorithm reach is THE differentiator (but outcome).

indicators.label: Golden Zone
indicators.notes: keep>=75 AND maxCliff>=0.15: 91/203 videos (45%), 36% hit 10M+, avg 5.2M. Practical pre-screening formula.

indicators.label: Cliff 0.25 Threshold
indicators.notes: maxCliff>=0.25: 15 videos, 40% hit 10M+, avg 5.7M. Extreme dramatic moments are the power zone.

indicators.label: Tier Engagement Flip
indicators.notes: Engaged%: 92.5% for 5-10M tier vs 56.5% for 100M+. Viral videos reach casual viewers. Swipe 43.5% vs 7.5%.

indicators.label: Sub Ret Gap Reversal
indicators.notes: Sub vs nonSub retention gap REVERSES by tier: 100M+ subs watch 4.2pts more, 10-50M subs watch 1pt LESS. Mega-viral engages loyal fans differently.

indicators.label: Ideal Curve Shape
indicators.notes: Ideal viral curve: 1.64x replay spike → 1.17 at 5% → 0.70 at 95%. Top-bottom gap GROWS toward tail (0.015 at 5% → 0.097 at 95%).

indicators.label: Upload Gap Sweetspot
indicators.notes: 4-7 days between uploads: 33% hit 10M+. 1-3 days: only 11%. Too-fast uploading hurts. Algorithm needs breathing room.

indicators.label: Post Hit Momentum
indicators.notes: After 10M+ hit: 33% next video also hits (avg 4.1M). After sub-1M miss: 14% hit rate (avg 1.1M). 2.4x momentum effect.

indicators.label: Retention Harmonic Mean
indicators.notes: r=+0.29 (203), r=+0.47 (370). Harmonic mean penalizes dips. MASSIVE on full set. Captures 'no weak spots' quality.

indicators.label: Area Above 80
indicators.notes: r=+0.27 (203), r=+0.47 (370). Fraction above 80% retention. Tier: 100M+=0.69, sub1M=0.44. MASSIVE on full set.

indicators.label: Retention Dispersion
indicators.notes: r=+0.34 (203), r=+0.47 (370). IQR/median of retention. Wider relative spread = more views. Normalized curve quality metric.

indicators.label: Segment Duration Cv
indicators.notes: Tier: 100M+=0.47 vs sub1M=0.30 (1.57x). Uneven narrative segment lengths signal dramatic tension at top tier.

indicators.label: Hook Has Question
indicators.notes: r=+0.19 (370). 100M+ videos = 100% have question in first 10s. Table stakes for top tier. Questions create open loops.

indicators.label: Title Brevity
indicators.notes: 100M+ avg 4 words vs others 6-7. Weak r=+0.06 overall but strong tier separation. Concise titles at top.

indicators.label: Ret 90Pct
indicators.notes: r=+0.32 (203), r=+0.505 (370). MASSIVE on full set. Near-end retention is top-tier signal. Payoff delivery metric.

indicators.label: Ret 95Pct
indicators.notes: r=+0.32 (203), r=+0.501 (370). Very last moments retention. Near-identical to ret_90pct. Last 5-10% differentiates viral.

indicators.label: Day3 Growth Outlier
indicators.notes: OUTLIER PROFILE: day3Growth separates tiers by 11.86x (top/bottom). Next biggest: subViewShare 0.09x, subNonSubDelta 4.66x, d2d1Ratio 3.39x.

indicators.label: Tier Narrative Structure
indicators.notes: 100M+ has 7 segments (avg), segDurationCV=0.47, hookDur=5s, sentenceCount=15.6. Others: 5 segs, CV=0.30, hookDur=7s, sent=4.8. Top videos have MORE complex, VARIED narrative structure.

indicators.label: Full Set Retention Signals
indicators.notes: On 370 videos: retHarmMean r=+0.47, areaAbove80 r=+0.47, retDispersion r=+0.47, ret90pct r=+0.51, ret95pct r=+0.50. All MASSIVE on expanded sample. These curve tail signals unlock at n>200.

indicators.label: Trajectory Delayed Peak
indicators.notes: delayed_peak (day3+): 31% hit 10M+, avg 3.3M, n=153. early_peak: 0% hit, avg 0.4M, n=15. TRAJECTORY SHAPE IS DESTINY.

indicators.label: Early Peak Death
indicators.notes: early_peak (peak day0, d1share>15%): 0% hit 10M+ (n=15). Confirms spike_decay (loop_b_58) on larger sample. Day 1 peaking = algorithm rejection.

indicators.label: Independence Matrix
indicators.notes: INDEPENDENCE: deriv2Std×day3Growth=0.04, deriv2Std×first3Share=-0.10, day3Growth×first3Share=-0.11. Three truly orthogonal signal dimensions found.

indicators.label: Multi Control Surviving
indicators.notes: After controlling for BOTH keep AND retention: first3Share r_p=-0.33, day3Growth r_p=+0.29, deriv2Std r_p=+0.28, maxConsecGrowth r_p=+0.22, curveRange r_p=+0.22.

indicators.label: Curve Retention Collinearity
indicators.notes: areaAbove80, retHarmMean, ret90pct are 85-95% correlated with each other and drop to r_p=0.07-0.11 after controlling keep+retention. COLLINEAR — choose one representative.

indicators.label: Independent Trio
indicators.notes: BEST INDEPENDENT 3-SIGNAL SET: z(day3Growth)-z(first3Share)+z(deriv2Std). All three r>0.28 with views after double-control, mutual r<0.15. Three dimensions: acceleration, trajectory, pacing.

indicators.label: Transcript Timing Null
indicators.notes: ALL transcript timing signals (word gaps, speaking rate, pauses, breathlessness) have r_partial<0.12. Transcript timing does NOT predict views.

indicators.label: Engagement Dilution V2
indicators.notes: totalEngagement r_p=-0.20, engQuality r_p=-0.19. ALL per-view engagement metrics are INVERSE. Viral = passive viewers. Consistent across likes, comments, shares per view.

indicators.label: Triple Indep Robust
indicators.notes: tripleComposite r_p=+0.508 after controlling for keep+retention+maxCliff+keepSq. SURVIVES ALL 4 model features. Captures entirely new dimension.

indicators.label: D3G Standalone Power
indicators.notes: day3Growth alone: r_p=+0.482 after controlling keep+ret+cliff+keepSq. Strongest single NEW signal after 4-feature control. Algorithm acceleration is an independent dimension.

indicators.label: Sub Efficiency
indicators.notes: r=+0.57, r_p=+0.62. Sub conversions per subscriber viewer. VERY STRONG but OUTCOME. Viral videos convert non-sub audiences to subscribers efficiently.

indicators.label: Duration Deviation
indicators.notes: r=+0.08, r_p=+0.17. Deviating from recent 3-video avg duration predicts MORE views. FORMAT NOVELTY helps. Counter-intuitive: consistency in length hurts.

indicators.label: Prev View Trend
indicators.notes: r=+0.07, r_p=+0.16. View trend over last 3 videos (ascending momentum). Captures whether creator momentum is BUILDING vs declining.

indicators.label: Duration Sweetspot V2
indicators.notes: 45-60s: 28% hit 10M+, avg 2.5M, n=137. 30-45s: 16% hit, avg 1.6M, n=169. 15-30s: 2% hit, avg 0.7M, n=47. DEATH ZONE confirmed <30s.

indicators.label: Multi Control Summary
indicators.notes: After 4-feature control: tripleComposite +0.51, d3g +0.48, payoffEff +0.49, f3share -0.32, d2Std +0.27, esRatio +0.25. ALL survive. New signals are truly ORTHOGONAL to existing model.

indicators.label: Sub Efficiency Outcome
indicators.notes: subEfficiency (subs gained per sub viewer) r_p=+0.62. Highest engagement metric found. But circular: algorithm pushes to non-subs who then sub. Consequence not cause.

indicators.label: D3G Unpredictable
indicators.notes: day3Growth is UNPREDICTABLE from all pre-upload features (max r=0.08). No content feature, curve feature, or sequence feature predicts early algorithmic acceleration. It IS the algorithm's decision signal.

indicators.label: F3Share Predictable
indicators.notes: first3Share IS partially predictable: prevKeep r=-0.29, keep r=-0.27, ret90 r=-0.26. Better quality (own + previous) → more sustained trajectory. Partially causal chain.

indicators.label: Optimal 4Signal
indicators.notes: z(keep)-z(f3share)+z(d3g)+z(esRatio): r=0.681. 46% of view variance from just 4 signals. Combines pre-upload quality with post-upload trajectory.

indicators.label: Prevkeep Predicts Trajectory
indicators.notes: prevKeep → f3share: r=-0.29. Previous video's keep rate predicts THIS video's trajectory sustainability. Mechanism: good prior keep → algorithm gives longer runway.

indicators.label: Trajectory Is Algorithm
indicators.notes: Meta-finding: trajectory signals (d3g, f3share) are NOT content properties — they are ALGORITHM RESPONSES. d3g captures the algorithm's amplification decision. Cannot be used for pre-upload prediction.

indicators.label: Vzscore Frontloads
indicators.notes: vzScore → f3share: r=+0.22. Higher visual Zeigarnik → MORE front-loaded trajectory. Strong hooks attract fast initial viewers but may not sustain. Implication: vz is a day1 signal, not a trajectory signal.
